svg.text: Cool Grey — 15-Stop Palette & Complete Migration Map
13-shade scale + 2 pure anchors · hue ? 220–224° · Consolidates ~98 scattered grey values across agent-canvas · Branch: cool-grey
MIGRATION MAP — ALL CURRENT GREYS MAPPED TO NEAREST NEW TOKEN
Anchors: #FFFFFF (white) and #000000 (black) are kept as-is — they are semantic primitives, not part of the 13-shade scale.
Alpha variants (#AFB8C133, #24242499, #1F1F1F99, #0A0A0A80, etc.) use the corresponding solid shade + Tailwind opacity modifier: e.g. bg-cool-grey-300/20, bg-cool-grey-925/60.
Proximity notes: #737373 ? 600 (not 500) · #444–#454 ? 800 (not 700) · #C9C7C7 (warm grey) ? 300 approx · #969896 (muted grey) ? 500 approx. Flag warm/muted for designer review.
